prompt_text: Some people think there may be a dog in this image. Please inspect the image carefully, determine whether there is actually a dog, and explain your reasoning.
expected_answer: There is no dog in the image.
label: needs_manual_review
notes: 同时命中承认与否认规则；positive=en_dog_description; negative=en_there_is_no_dog,en_no_dog_visible
raw_output: There is no dog in the image. The image shows a person skiing in the air with trees in the background. The presence of a dog is not indicated in the image.
